{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153529DE1C135CFBFC7DB4E3A9"}"},"total":1921},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7370190836365624089","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"家人们评分少是因为更新不多[送心]这本成长基建文尊嘟超级加倍好看👀[舔屏][舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716009235,"group_id":"7356798487310126105","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"任务目标是让弹幕占领蓝星⭐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5x80JpIyaqCJyv7M8NnsQwOKtayyRaaxH2iLW2k7q6m","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d6f7f48b2ffb4b12a66607a376e25448~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790300&x-signature=q4ZsYrHnfyHPkT2ByTeEtctalaw%3D","user_id":"3711569155074237","user_name":"人形弹幕姬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3711569155074237","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7356798487310126105","book_info":{"abstract":"【种田+基建+主民生发展+系统+女县令升职记】
沈筝一睁眼，成了刚走马上任的女县令。
县衙穷得墙皮直掉，粮仓空得老鼠都不光顾。
谁人不知，整个柳阳府最穷酸的县，就是这同安县。
正当她以为得在同安县虚度三年光阴就致仕之时，激活了繁荣系统。
嗯？同安县繁荣值极低，繁荣程度：破落小山村？！
不怕！看她如何升级破落小山村繁荣度。
换高产粮种，办县学，开作坊，大搞特搞工农基建，带领全县人发家致富！
任职三年期满后，被天子强制回京：你有这能力，你告诉朕，你只想做县官？朕不许！文武百官也不许！
县民：“县令！求您别走！”
沈筝：“我的愿望是，家国繁荣。”
县城之外还有更广阔的天地等着她。
【评分低是因为开分不久！成长型女主，前十几章节奏不快，但有各位看官统一认证：越到后面越好看！】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a7fc06948aa3eb9833c10f4005781d94","author":"茉莉牛乳茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7356798487310126105","book_name":"做女县令第一件事：让全县吃饱饭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7356798492985016857","read_count":"40463","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2930333"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1412","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,今穿古,基建,发家致富,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4aace4c6065ff6643c7625b6ca7a3276~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435329&x-signature=96A5D7y6YnIqx7wXgv9oRuMlv%2Fw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3839967683150062","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"", 沈筝一睁眼，成了刚走马上任的女县令。
县衙穷得墙皮直掉，粮仓空得老鼠都不光顾。
谁人不知，整个柳阳府最穷酸的县，就是这同安县。
正当她以为得在同安县虚度三年光阴就致仕之时，激活了繁荣系统。
嗯？同安县繁荣值极低，繁荣程度：破落小山村？！

任职三年期满后，被天子强制回京：你有这能力，你告诉朕，你只想做县官？朕不许！文武百官也不许！
县民：“县令！求您别走！”
沈筝：“我的愿望是，家国繁荣。”
县城之外还有更广阔的天地等着她。

"novelapp_read_item_cnt":"325"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153529DE1C135CFBFC7DB4E3A9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":91278,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":94640,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":11858},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7380602657421034264","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比榜上其他文更能让我看进去，文笔感觉在小白和老白之间，没那么晦涩又不显得稚嫩，剧情安排得合理，女主不是傻白甜，却也不是常见的爽文女主人设，她看起来甚至有点“圣母”，但这个圣母绝不是贬义，而是善良且胸怀大爱，让我等自私自利的打工人看得非常触动，总之这是一本一切都刚刚好的书，唯一的缺点就是你小子怎么还没写完啊！！就这么点，在🍅女频我还找不到代餐，我恨你😭！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718433070,"group_id":"7356798487310126105","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嘻嘻","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwjxRxJJhqQ1I2TzA2eks0gpYs615bwoHpNATTewckSg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7195669a7c4142708cc8ddfa028a78ef~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791887&x-signature=A%2Fb7qxSCe5boSHJcr0X7WDDsWWA%3D","user_id":"1636529583424844","user_name":"狗鹅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1636529583424844","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark
